questionHtml: Suggest a reason for including a lid with vents above the water reservoir.
markschemeHtml:
1. lowers evaporation of water;
  2. vents allow air to enter as water leaves the reservoir;
  3. allows for pressure changes in the reservoir as water flows to the flask;

meta.title: Suggest a reason for including a lid with vents above the water reservoir.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
